pull_request.title: feat: add support for chunked file uploads
pull_request.body:
## Summary

This PR adds chunked upload support to handle files larger than 10MB without crashing.

## Changes

- Added `ChunkedUploader` class in `src/upload.py`
- Updated `UploadHandler` to use chunked strategy for files > 5MB
- Added unit tests for the new uploader
- Updated API documentation

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added
- [ ] Tested with 50MB file on local environment

Closes #99
